user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Roots or Hudson's Bay Flagship
fields.description: Shopping stop for Canadian souvenirs and gifts before heading to the CN Tower.

insertion_point.reasoning: Position 1 places the shopping stop after breakfast and before the CN Tower lunch, allowing time to purchase gifts in the morning.
